Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The Shape of Inequalities 57 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. Gluon: Explicit Performance 16 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. An update on Steam / GOG changes for OpenTTD 31 upvotes, 3 comments
  5. Consensus Board Game 57 upvotes, 9 comments
  6. Pretraining Language Models via Neural Cellular Automata 82 upvotes, 16 comments
  7. Nvidia greenboost: transparently extend GPU VRAM using system RAM/NVMe 449 upvotes, 124 comments
  8. Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster 17 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. Conway's Game of Life, in real life 285 upvotes, 77 comments
  10. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 97 upvotes, 24 comments
  11. Love of corporate bullshit is correlated with bad judgment 26 upvotes, 4 comments
  12. US has "lost control of its own foreign policy", Oman says 14 upvotes, 1 comments
  13. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 123 upvotes, 37 comments
  14. How to Not Pay Your Taxes 13 upvotes, 1 comments
  15. Hyper-optimized reverse geocoding API 34 upvotes, 8 comments
  16. Eniac, the First General-Purpose Digital Computer, Turns 80 92 upvotes, 38 comments
  17. Afroman found not liable in defamation case 893 upvotes, 491 comments
  18. macOS 26 breaks custom DNS settings including .internal 181 upvotes, 87 comments
  19. Monuses and Heaps 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. Ramtrack.eu – RAM Price Intelligence 48 upvotes, 18 comments
  21. Juggalo Makeup Blocks Facial Recognition Technology (2019) 169 upvotes, 84 comments
  22. Prompt Injecting Contributing.md 42 upvotes, 16 comments
  23. Astral to Join OpenAI 799 upvotes, 496 comments
  24. LotusNotes 164 upvotes, 93 comments
  25. US messageboard 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches 41 upvotes, 18 comments
  26. What if Python was natively distributable? 25 upvotes, 12 comments
  27. I turned Markdown into a protocol for generative UI 12 upvotes, 4 comments
  28. World Happiness Report 2026 37 upvotes, 24 comments
  29. Launch HN: Canary (YC W26) – AI QA that understands your code 10 upvotes, 9 comments
  30. Gauntlet AI (YC S17): Fly you to Austin, train you in AI, give you $200k+ job 0 upvotes, 0 comments
